project.component: { "keyToString": { "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Python tests.Python tests in test_api_request.py.executor": "Run", "Python tests.Python tests in test_data_processor.py.executor": "Run", "Python tests.Python tests in test_database_operations.py.executor": "Run", "Python.app.executor": "Run", "Python.settings.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "com.jetbrains.python.configuration.PyIntegratedToolsModulesConfigurable" } }
